algorithm.input: finite IEEE-754 binary64 leaf bit patterns retained by the source trace
algorithm.tie_policy: preserve the first candidate seen on exact equality

claim_boundary.what_is_not_supported: an integrated Qiskit source patch, acceptable production overhead, changed route quality beyond the frozen matrix, a confirmed Qiskit bug, hardware relevance, quantum advantage, BQP separation, solved B4/B8/B10, or new credit
claim_boundary.what_is_supported: a replay-backed fixed-grid exact-score shadow comparator that preserves the R169 non-ties and repairs the R170/R172 exact ties under first-seen semantics
